description: Substitution of visually identical characters from different Unicode scripts (homoglyphs). In practice, handles are almost always Latin-based (URL constraints), so the dominant pattern is mixing Cyrillic homoglyphs into an otherwise Latin handle, or writing a Cyrillic word entirely in Latin lookalikes.

full_substitution.description: All eligible characters in the handle are replaced with homoglyphs from the other script

partial_substitution.description: Only some characters are replaced; the rest remain in the original script

notes: Cyrillic homoglyphs are visually indistinguishable from their Latin counterparts in most fonts
Most platforms restrict usernames to ASCII/Latin, so the dominant real-world pattern is a Latin-looking handle that contains Cyrillic codepoints
Unicode codepoints are provided to help tooling detect mixed-script strings that appear identical to the human eye
script_switch can be combined with leet (see combined.json (WIP) )

verified_examples.source: disrespect_d' (Discord) account name in Escape From Tarkov
